user.title: Connect to DeepSeek
user.description: Enter your DeepSeek API key and pick the model you'd like to use. Get an API key at {api_keys_url}.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate DeepSeek
reauth_confirm.description: Your DeepSeek API key is no longer valid. Generate a new one at {api_keys_url} and paste it below.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach api.deepseek.com — check your network.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — see Home Assistant logs.

init.title: DeepSeek options
init.description: Tune model selection and conversation parameters at any time.

generate.name: Generate text
generate.description: Send a prompt to DeepSeek and return the response.

config_entry.name: Config entry
config_entry.description: DeepSeek entry to use. Leave empty to use the first one.

prompt.name: Prompt
prompt.description: The user message sent to the model.

system_prompt.name: System prompt
system_prompt.description: Optional system instructions placed before the prompt.

model.name: Model
model.description: Override the model configured for this entry.

max_tokens.name: Max tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens to generate in the reply.
